mapper.select: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_ATTEMPT_SEQ(POS_TRX, LAST_SEQ, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{posTrx}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (POS_TRX) DO UPDATE SET LAST_SEQ = LAST_SEQ + 1, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING LAST_SEQ;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_ATTEMPT (POS_TRX, ATTEMPT_SEQ, AMOUNT, CARD_BIN, CARD_LAST4, CARD_BRAND, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{attempt.posTrx}, #{attempt.attemptSeq}, #{attempt.amount}, #{attempt.cardBin}, #{attempt.cardLast4}, #{attempt.cardBrand}, #{attempt.createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
mapper.select: SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS, A.APPROVAL_NO, A.DECLINE_CODE, A.CARD_BIN, A.CARD_LAST4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ, A.amount from PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} ORDER BY A.ATTEMPT_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1
